name: Twilio API
what_it_does: Cloud communications platform providing programmable SMS, voice calls, WhatsApp messaging, email, and video APIs for building communication workflows into applications.
use_cases: Sending SMS notifications and alerts from agent workflows
Automated phone call initiation and IVR systems
WhatsApp messaging for customer communication automation
Two-factor authentication via SMS or voice
Building AI-powered customer support phone systems
not_for: Free high-volume messaging (costs add up quickly)
Real-time chat applications (use dedicated chat APIs)
Email marketing campaigns at scale (use SendGrid instead)
Teams without budget for per-message pricing
best_when: An agent needs to send SMS messages, make phone calls, or communicate via WhatsApp as part of a business workflow.
avoid_when: You need free or very-low-cost messaging at scale, or you need a dedicated MCP server integration.

auth.notes: Uses Account SID + Auth Token pair as HTTP Basic Auth credentials. API keys can be created for more granular access. Simple to set up for agents.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Trial account with $15 credit, limited to verified numbers
pricing.notes: Pay-as-you-go pricing. Volume discounts available. Trial accounts can only send to verified phone numbers which limits agent testing.

performance.rate_limits: 100 requests/second per account by default, higher limits available

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Twilio returns structured error codes (21xxx series) with links to documentation. Very agent-friendly error messages with clear remediation guidance.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: No native idempotency keys. Duplicate SMS sends are possible if agent retries. Use MessagingServiceSid for some deduplication.
known_agent_gotchas: Trial accounts can only send to verified phone numbers - breaks agent testing
US A2P 10DLC registration required for business SMS - can take days to approve
Rate limits can throttle agents sending many messages in burst
No MCP server available - agents must use REST API or SDK directly
Phone number formatting must be E.164 (+1XXXXXXXXXX) - common agent mistake
